question_intent: Calculate the average charge amount for lodging and meals categories, where the provider is located in the North American region, and the member has made at least one payment

plan.question_intent: Calculate the average charge amount for lodging and meals categories, where the provider is located in the North American region, and the member has made at least one payment
plan.detail_query: SELECT leaf_1.member_no, leaf_1.charge_no, leaf_1.charge_amt, leaf_1.region_name, leaf_1.category_desc FROM (SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc FROM member AS m JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no JOIN region AS r ON p.region_no = r.region_no JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals') AND r.region_name = 'North American' AND m.member_no IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_no FROM payment)) AS leaf_1

blocks.name: leaf_1
blocks.select_clause: SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
join_clauses: JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
JOIN region AS r ON p.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
where_clauses: m.member_no IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_no FROM payment)
blocks.group_by_clause: GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
blocks.notes: This block returns member numbers, charge numbers, charge amounts, region names, and category descriptions for charges in the Lodging and Meals categories, where the provider is located in the North American region, and the member has made at least one payment

blocks.name: root
blocks.notes: This block calculates the average charge amount from the leaf_1 block

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM member AS m
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no

FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
LIMIT 5

JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
LIMIT 5

JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no

steps.sql:

FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
JOIN region AS r ON p.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
LIMIT 5

SELECT *
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
JOIN region AS r ON p.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE ((cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals'))
LIMIT 5

JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE ((cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals')) AND (r.region_name = 'North American')
LIMIT 5

steps.clause: m.member_no IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_no FROM charge)
steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
JOIN region AS r ON p.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no

LIMIT 5

SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
JOIN region AS r ON p.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE ((cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals')) AND (m.member_no IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_no FROM charge))
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc

build_logs.notes: This block calculates the average charge amount from the leaf_1 block

steps.sql:
SELECT *
FROM (SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
JOIN region AS r ON p.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE ((cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals')) AND (m.member_no IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_no FROM charge))
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc) AS leaf_1
LIMIT 5

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt) AS final_avg_charge_amt
FROM (SELECT m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
JOIN region AS r ON p.region_no = r.region_no
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
WHERE ((cat.category_desc = 'Lodging' OR cat.category_desc = 'Meals')) AND (m.member_no IN (SELECT DISTINCT member_no FROM charge))
GROUP BY m.member_no, c.charge_no, c.charge_amt, r.region_name, cat.category_desc) AS leaf_1

nearest.sql:
SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT * FROM (SELECT c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, c.charge_code, cat.category_desc, r.region_name
FROM charge AS c
JOIN category AS cat ON c.category_no = cat.category_no
JOIN provider AS p ON c.provider_no = p.provider_no
JOIN region AS r ON p.region_no = r.region_no
WHERE (cat.category_desc = 'Meals'))) AS leaf_1

SELECT AVG(leaf_1.charge_amt)
FROM (SELECT m.member_no, m.firstname, m.lastname, c.charge_no, c.charge_dt, c.charge_amt, p.payment_dt, r.region_name
FROM member AS m
JOIN charge AS c ON m.member_no = c.member_no
JOIN payment AS p ON m.member_no = p.member_no
JOIN region AS r ON m.region_no = r.region_no) AS leaf_1

question: What is the average charge amount for all individual charges made by members in the 'Lodging' or 'Meals' categories?
